name: @scalar/azure-functions
description: The `Scalar.Azure.Functions` NuGet package provides an easy way to render beautiful API References based on OpenAPI/Swagger documents in Azure Functions.
author: Scalar (https://github.com/scalar)

scalarReadme.title: Scalar API Reference for Azure Functions

extraContent.headline: Extended Examples
extraContent.content: For more realistic examples and advanced usage scenarios, such as the built-in `HttpRequestData` HTTP model and routing details, check out our [extended examples documentation](https://github.com/scalar/scalar/blob/main/integrations/dotnet/azure-functions/docs/README.md).
